summary: Position Status Layer feature fully tested. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: PositionBar displays status badge (AT RISK) with correct icon and color. OrientationCard displays status tag and status-aware message ('Your account has active risk signals — focus on authentic contributions to recover.'). Both components render on Feed and Profile pages.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/position/{user_id} correctly returns 'status' object with: status, icon, label, color, reason fields
GET /api/orientation/{user_id} correctly returns 'status' object and status-aware messaging for At Risk users

Status calculation in utils/status_calculator.py correctly implements movement-based rules: atRisk (risk signals OR 14+ days inactive), rising (pos/trust increase + recent activity), decaying (inactive OR negative change), stable (default)
Position Bar (PositionBar.js) correctly displays status badge with data-testid='position-status-badge' using STATUS_ICONS mapping
Orientation Card (OrientationCard.js) correctly displays status tag with data-testid='orientation-status-tag'
CSS classes .position-status-badge and .orientation-status-tag properly styled with --status-color variable
position_snapshots collection is updated (one per user per day) on position endpoint calls
Status is consistent between position and orientation endpoints for the same user

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified via browser automation)

test_credentials.user_1: newuser@test.com / password123 / Contributing position, has active risk signals (shows AT RISK)
test_credentials.user_2: trust_fragile@test.com / password123 / Also has risk signals

context_for_next_testing_agent: Position Status Layer fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: position-bar, position-status-badge, orientation-card, orientation-status-tag, orientation-msg. Status types: rising (green #10b981, up icon), stable (amber #f59e0b, right icon), decaying (red #ef4444, down icon), atRisk (red #dc2626, warning icon). Both test users have active risk signals so they show 'atRisk' status. Status is movement-based, not time-only. Position endpoint saves daily snapshots to position_snapshots collection.
